meta.title: Your Final Songs
meta.description: Browse, play, and share your finalized custom songs.

hero.title: Your finished songs, gathered in one place
hero.description: Every song you have finalized after choosing a sample lives here for playback, sharing, downloads, wall art, and music video creation.

card.fallback: A finalized custom song ready to play and share.

noMatches.title: No songs match that search
noMatches.description: Try another occasion or a shorter search term.

noSongs.title: No final songs yet
noSongs.description: Create a song sample, choose your favorite version, then your final song will appear here.
